From the following TAF you can assume that visibility at 2055Z in Birmingham (EGBB) will be:

EGBB 261000Z 2618/2712 28015G25KT 9999 SCT025 TEMPO 2618/2622 29018G35KT 4000 SHRASN BKN010CB PROB30 TEMPO 2618/2621 1500 TSGR BKN004CB BECMG 2622/2624 26010KT=

options.b: a minimum of 1,5 km and a maximum of 5 km.
options.d: not less than 1,5 km but could be in excess of 10 km.
